generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While our leaders talk about 'strategic autonomy,' they're quietly letting foreign tech giants control our critical infrastructure. We can't afford to be this vulnerable. It's time to demand real independence in our defense and tech sectors. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomyNow
